name: Tomato-Zucchini Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine chili powder, 1 1/2 teaspoons parsley flakes, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper.
2. Place half the zucchini in a lightly greased 6-cup casserole dish or layer with half the tomatoes.
3. Sprinkle with half the seasoning mixture.
4. Repeat the layers.
5. Combine bread crumbs, oil, and remaining parsley flakes; sprinkle over vegetables.
6. Bake, uncovered, in a preheated 375°F oven until vegetables are tender, about 40 minutes.
